name: feature-loader-stub-wiring
description: Phase 0 feature loader (ADR 0014) — verify all 14 stubs are wired. For each feature, toggle off→on, assert activations >= 1 (stub idiom: applyFeatureTransition increments on every off→on). Skip features that are mutex with already-on ones; reset state between each. The fixture passes only when every one of the 14 features has logged at least one activation.

commands: (async () => { const keys = ['progressiveBrickBaking','resolutionRampAtlasBuild','splatCache','svoStorageBackend','vdbBackend','bvhAtomDispatch','perfectHashIndirection','persistentThreadBake','eventDrivenRender','bc4AtlasCompression','silhouetteFirstBake','dawnPipelineCacheSpike','meshDrivenClassification','meshBootstrapRaymarch']; const failures = []; for (const k of keys) { window.__canaryLoadFeatureProfile('default'); window.__canarySetDisplayState({features: {[k]: 'on'}}); const status = window.__canaryGetFeatureStatus(k); if (!status || status.ok === false) { failures.push(k + ': status null'); continue; } if (status.activations < 1) { failures.push(k + ': activations=' + status.activations + ' (expected >=1)'); } if (status.mode !== 'on') { failures.push(k + ': mode=' + status.mode + ' (expected on — feature was likely rejected by matrix)'); } } if (failures.length > 0) throw new Error('stub-wiring failures: ' + failures.join('; ')); return 'all 14 stubs wired'; })()
